content: Judge the T49 OnboardingDelivery implementation. Score 0-100. Iron rules (70 points): completedSteps tracking (20), ITenantRegistry for workspace (20), workspace idempotency (15), CF-4 completion gate (15). DNA compliance (20 points): DNA-8 per step (10), DNA-5 tenant scope (10). Quality (10 points): FREEDOM config for step list, resume logic correct. Score-0 violations: raw workspace INSERT, missing idempotency, early UserOnboardingCompleted emission, hardcoded step list.
